refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying each sub-function's contribution to overall cycle time reduction.

selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system + Optimized travel path planning + Efficient dump mechanism

potential_sources: Load operation affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically decoupled by cycle phase but require coordination at cycle transitions, which is manageable.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate site and duty cycle data for optimization
Risk of suboptimal coordination between load, travel, and dump phases
High safety criticality requires robust fail-safe mechanisms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage phase transitions and safety interlocks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for cycle time optimization including load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time operational data and status feedback for cycle phases

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands and cycle targets from higher-level control or operator

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety alerts related to cycle operations and deviations

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Enables communication with Teleoperation and Safety Services modules

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of cycle time optimization logic and coordination
Executes physical load, travel, and dump operations but less responsible for cycle time logic
Supports remote control but not primary for cycle time optimization
Monitors safety but does not directly control cycle time

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic and coordination in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple cycle phases
Risk of interface overload with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution for each cycle phase.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR decomposition is clear and DPs logically address each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Cycle time logic concentrated in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as primary owner; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution with supporting roles for Vehicle and other modules.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface for phase transitions
Refine interface definitions to reduce overload
Consider modularization within NGHE Solution for maintainability

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risks and clear ownership.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; next step is to decompose sub-FRs further.

assumptions: Site and duty cycle data are accurate and available
Safety criticality is addressed by Safety Services module in parallel
evidence_needed: Telemetry data confirming cycle time improvements
Verification of safety alert integration during cycle operations
